entry.title: Re: How to view or access CPI Audit Logs?
entry.content:
Please follow according to note 3463319 - How to view IAS audit logs in Audit Log Viewer. 

Please also check this thread https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/audit-log-viewer-service-shows-blank-page/qaq-p/12820087

entry.title: Re: Need help to calculate last 15 days of data in ABAP C...
entry.content:
Please check this help:

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_752_index_htm/7.52/en-US/abencds_f1_date_functions.htm#!ABAP_VARIANT_3@3@

entry.title: Can Crystal Server 2020 embed reports into body of email?
entry.content: When my scheduled reports run they send out emails with pdf attachments. Is there a way for me to embed the report directly into the body of the email so the end user does not have to open the attachment?

entry.title: SAP Personas 3.0 screen field is clearing off
entry.content:
We have an issue recently popped up. The behavior is as follows.

- Clicked a script button on main dashboard.

- script triggers a T-Code

- entry screen of the T-Code is presented

- when we start typing on any of the fields(doesn't matter if it is drop down, or plain text), the entered text gets cleared off immediately before even completing the entry or hitting Enter. And cursor goes back to the field where it originally was when starting the screen. The pre-populated values on other fields stay as it is. It doesn't matter whether the flavor is modified screen or unmodified standard SAP screen.

- If I continue to enter again being on the same screen everything is normal. It happens only the first time the screen was displayed.

I checked if the script is retriggered. It is not retriggered. It happens even when there is only one statement to trigger a t-code in entire script.

This started happening recently. It has impacted even the old dashboards that was working correctly until recent time.

I tried it both in MS Edge and Chrome.No difference in the behavior.

We have SCREEN PERSONAS  3.0         SP18     sap.com             SAP SCREEN PERSONAS 3.0

Any input is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: The 𝑻𝒊𝒓𝒂𝒏𝒈𝒂 𝑮𝒂𝒎𝒆 𝑰𝒏𝒗𝒊𝒕𝒆 Code is "4755218960930"

entry.title: Re: #COE#BUMA Populate Item Text Field in Purchase requis...
entry.content:
Hello, 

In this case, solution could be using the application Settings for Web Services, that enables you to import data from OCI catalogues. Below you will find SAP Documentation regarding this topic: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/41dc8457e0d7b576e10000000a4450e5.html?locale=en-US&version=2408.500

Hope it will help you.

Reagrds, 

Jagoda

entry.title: Re: BRF+ E-Mail Output for RFQ - to the email address of...
entry.content:
Please check this link.

Especially below text :

"Receiver Email Configuration: Email Recipient

In case of Receiver’s email address, we are fetching the email from customer master data. So, I created a FM – ZFI_FETCH_RECEIVER_EMAIL and from the available context, I used Recipient as IV_RECEIVER." You can adapt logic to read email based on user not on customer.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud - The source of delivery address in Pur...
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it the delivery address under PO line item? YES

What happens if there are multiple PO line items with different delivery addresses? You can have different delivery addresses for items in PO. In result You will have different delivery to different addresses.

entry.title: Re: Adobe Form : Dynamic font size adjustment
entry.content: Hi, I am having the similar requirement, could you please help, how we can change font size dynamically using JavaScript ?.

entry.title: Re: Extending Server-Side Caching not working
entry.content:
Thank you very much for your answer! SAP should pay you for fixing their documentation. Alternatively to #4, specifying the xyzoccCacheManager into the Cacheable annotation works too.

 

 

@Cacheable(value = "myCustomCache", key = "T(de.hybris.platform.commercewebservicescommons.cache.CommerceCacheKeyGenerator).generateKey(false,false,#myField)", cacheManager = "xyzoccCacheManager")

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Table with navigation to details on same view
entry.content: why bother to use js code to get data?

entry.title: Re: Need help to optimize/compact code with abap 7.4 syntax
entry.content:
TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_ctr,
         doc_num TYPE string,
         doc_soc TYPE string,
         doc_typ TYPE string,
       END OF ty_ctr.

TYPES tty_ctr TYPE SORTED TABLE OF ty_ctr WITH NON-UNIQUE KEY doc_num doc_typ.

CONSTANTS c_def     TYPE string VALUE 'ZZZZ'.

DATA lt_ctr_temp2   TYPE tty_ctr.

DATA(lt_ctr_ret) = VALUE tty_ctr( ( doc_num = '123' doc_soc = 'ZZ01' doc_typ = 'AQ' )
                                  ( doc_num = '123' doc_soc = 'ZZ02' doc_typ = 'AQ' )
                                  ( doc_num = '234' doc_soc = 'ZZ03' doc_typ = 'AQ' )
                                  ( doc_num = '567' doc_soc = 'ZZ04' doc_typ = 'ZZ' ) ).

LOOP AT lt_ctr_ret ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_ctr_ret>)
                                              GROUP BY ( item = <lfs_ctr_ret>-doc_num
                                                         doc_typ = <lfs_ctr_ret>-doc_typ
                                                         size = GROUP SIZE ) ASCENDING
                                   REFERENCE INTO DATA(lv_ctr_ret_group).



  LOOP AT GROUP lv_ctr_ret_group ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_grp_members>) ."WHERE posnr = <xvbap>-posnr." Loop through each group
    IF lv_ctr_ret_group->size > 1.
      <lfs_grp_members>-doc_soc = c_def.
      APPEND <lfs_grp_members> TO lt_ctr_temp2.
      EXIT. " Exit after 1 run
    ELSE.
      APPEND <lfs_grp_members> TO lt_ctr_temp2.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDLOOP.

 cl_demo_output=>display_data( lt_ctr_temp2 ).

Hello,

I think this could be a simpler version of the code.

Thanks
Kiran Angar

entry.title: Re: On-Premise AI Excellence: How SAP HANA EE and Skybuffer AI Deliver
entry.content: Thank you! We've gotten your email, replied back with the solution detailed overview.

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content:
Hi, 

RESULTLOOKUP()*RESULTLOOKUP() - it's multiplication of the same booked combinations from both accounts. 

Add context (all dimensions) to both of your Accounts (DRV0055 and DRV0020). Only identical combinations from these accounts will be multiplied.

Multiplication is happening on the row level.

In your case, you could define your formula (multiplication) in Account dimension in Formula field. In this case in report - SAC aggregate all dimensions and after will apply multiplication. 

More info you could find here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/ce7b148eeac942f6ad1d076d73d1e6fd.html?locale=en-US

Also aggregated result could be achieved through calculated measure. The question what is the end goal. In these both options calculation will be on fly

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Work Zone Language bug - solution
entry.content:
"It is unclear why French is selected as the fallback instead of English."

 

It really isn't. It even says it in your own screenshot. It choses the next language in the list. If you put 4 instead on 2, it becomes your fallback.

BWZ is still better than IAG in this regard, selecting the wrong language (default browser) there that is unsupported just kills the whole product.. 

Anyway, nice fix

entry.title: Re: Need help to optimize/compact code with abap 7.4 syntax
entry.content:
@Sandra_RossiI'm only challenging ways to do the same results in a compact way, it is not about performance improvement.

I know that compacting not always improve the readability or even the flexibility of the code but, to improve my Abap knowledge, I experimenting every time the ways to have less rows code possible with same result.

Like an exercise, I needed a simple confront with someone who have "mastered" the abap 7.4 syntax that can tell me the way to compact the above code even against of readability.

entry.title: Re: Need help to optimize/compact code with abap 7.4 syntax
entry.content: Nice one!

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sac-connections-cleanup/ba-p/13577399

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Difference between Assignment of People and Assignmen...
entry.content: Thanks, Ryan. The third link is more relevant. I expected the Assignment of Person to Operation via Maintenance Scheduling Board (F2603) to help with assignment and dispatch from single app, but it doesn't. The current function of assigning people isn’t reflected in WO, which isn't helpful. I'll wait for the Q4 release. Until then, assigning people from Maintenance Scheduling Board (F2603) doesn’t make sense for my needs, though it might work in other scenarios. Thanks, R

entry.title: Re: HANA Express Docker on Ubuntu
entry.content:
Thanks. Got it working. Just a little correction - there are 3 forward slashes on file path: 

--passwords-url file:///hana/mounts/hxe.json \

entry.title: How to enable SAP Audit Log Viewer service to collect all Audit logs from BTP Services - Part 1
entry.content:
1. To subscribe to SAP Audit Log Viewer service, use the SAP BTP cockpit and go to the Services  Instances and Subscriptions  Subscriptions tab of your subaccount.
  2. Once you're subscribed, select Go to Application to open the SAP Audit Log Viewer service and log in there

Steps to enable Audit Logs Access

Create a RoleCollectionSearch for roles with the name "Audit Logs" and select both entries with the following application identifiers:

  • auditlog-management!b*
  • auditlog-viewer!t*

Assign the role to a user or create a rule to assign it to users based on the SAML Assertion coming from the IDP

This blog contains a list of the Cloud Foundry services that log audit events. The logged events are service specific and determined by the service itself. The Audit Log service does not know what audit events the services log, it only provides the infrastructure for services to write the logs, and for customers to read them by using the Audit Log Retrieval API and the Audit Log Viewer. For more information about the audit events logged by a service, follow the corresponding link in the table.

Audit Log Events by ServiceService Audit log events page of the service

Authorization and Trust ManagementAuditing and Logging Information for SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service
Business Entity RecognitionAuditing and Logging Information
Business LoggingAuditing and Logging
Business RulesAuditing and Logging Information
Custom Domain (Cloud Foundry)Auditing and Logging Information
Data Attribute RecommendationAuditing and Logging Information
Document ClassificationAuditing and Logging Information
Document Information ExtractionAuditing and Logging Information
Document ManagementAuditing and Logging Information
Identity AuthenticationAuditing and Logging Information
Invoice Object RecommendationAuditing and Logging Information
Process VisibilityAuditing and Logging Information
SAP AI CoreAuditing and Logging Information
SAP AI LaunchpadAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Alert Notification ServiceAuditing and Logging Information
SAP API ManagementAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Build AppsAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Build Process AutomationAudit Logging
SAP Build Work Zone, standard editionAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Build Work Zone, advanced editionAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Business Application StudioAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Cloud ALMIntegration of Audit Log Service
SAP Cloud Identity Access GovernanceIntegration of Audit Log Service
SAP Cloud Integration (Cloud Foundry)Auditing and Logging Information
SAP Cloud Integration for data servicesSecurity Log
SAP Cloud Portal serviceAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Cloud Transport ManagementAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Credential StoreAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Conversational AIAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Data Privacy IntegrationAccess to Audit Logs
SAP Datasphere CloudAudit Logging
SAP Enterprise Architecture Designer, Cloud EditionAuditing and Logging
SAP Edge Services, Cloud EditionAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Event MeshAuditing and Logging Information
SAP HANA Service for SAP BTP in AWS and Google Cloud RegionsAuditing
SAP HANA Service for SAP BTP in SAP RegionsAuditing
SAP Integration AdvisorAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Leonardo Machine Learning FoundationLogging
SAP Market Rates Management, Bring Your Own Rates data optionAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Market Rates Management, Refinitiv data optionAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Mobile Services (Cloud Foundry)Viewing Audit Logs
SAP Monitoring ServiceAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Omnichannel Promotion PricingAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Print ServiceAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Private Link Service (Beta)Audit and Logging Information
SAP S/4HANA Cloud ExtensibilityAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUIAuditing and Logging Information
SAP StartSecurity Events Logged by the Interest Cards Service
SAP SuccessFactors ExtensibilityAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Task CenterAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Variant Configuration and PricingAudit Logging
SAP Web AnalyticsAuditing and Logging Information
SAP Web IDE Full-StackAuditing and Logging Information
Service Ticket IntelligenceAuditing and Logging Information
UI Theme DesignerAuditing and Logging Information
UI5 Flexibility for Key UsersAuditing and Logging Information
Unit of MeasureAudit Logging
WorkflowAudit Logs

entry.title: FSCM CashMgm: Fully delivered and invoiced displayed as liquidity item
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

We have several POs with fully delivered and fully invoiced statuses that are being displayed in the Cash Flow Analyzer as liquidity items.

If I manually flag the Final Invoice field, the PO is no longer displayed. However, if there is an invoice reversal, the flow is not updated anymore.

Have you ever faced it?  Is there any SAP Note to fix it?

Thanks, 

BR

RL

entry.title: Re: Step by Step instruction to Setup / Update IAS User Passwords in Mass using Postman
entry.content:
As per the Note, the APIs mentioned on line #1# are deprecated:

  • The SCIM Rest API's mentioned above are deprecated with limited availability, these are replaced with the new Identity Directory Service SCIM Rest API's available at the API Business Hub 

    Is there any update to using the new APIs, or any major difference? Or what you have in the blog ARE showing with the new APIs?

entry.title: Re: Can Crystal Server 2020 embed reports into body of em...
entry.content:
AFAIK, Crystal Server can't do that. But there are 3rd-party Crystal Reports schedulers that can.
Ken Hamady maintains a listing of 3rd-party Crystal Reports schedulers here.

Here's a video demo of one way (there are others) of embedding the report inside an email message: 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vg8CjyfANF0
Disclosure: I'm the developer of the software demonstrated in this video.

entry.title: Re: On-Premise AI Excellence: How SAP HANA EE and Skybuffer AI Deliver
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing.
I'd also like to receive the documents of solution detailed overview.
Thanks.

entry.title: MDK Filter Action and QuerySpecifier quotes
entry.content:
It's very likely I've done something wrong but I can't figure out what.

I have a filter page that has FormCellFilter control.  In the control I've specified an Object collection FilterProperty.  I've set my ReturnValue as a query string that would contain quotes around the desired filter value:

The problem is when the modal is closed and the ObjectTable does a requery, it seems the query string has the quote characters delimited, and the OData call fails:

Is there something I've done wrong?  I've also tried returning the text from a rule with different variation, but had no luck there either.

entry.title: Re: Create PO from PR by Process Purchase Requisitions (V2)
entry.content:
Hi @kaya-ya,
Since some item-level information from the purchase requisition will be used at the header level in the purchase order, could you check if the Purchasing Group is the same for all items?

entry.title: Re: Table to find PR created from Ariba
entry.content:
Hi @preethialevarthi,

To verify if the PR was created by Ariba, check the table /ARBA/PR_HISTORY or ARBCIG_PRHISTORY, depending on your SAP Ariba integration.
More details are available in this link: About Migrating Data from the /ARBA/ Database Table to the ARBCIG_ Database Table | SAP Help Portal

Best Regards,

Rafael Tinoco

entry.title: Not allocated difference in CKMLCP
entry.content:
Hi

In ckmlcp settlement, we have several material with Not allocated difference,for example, material 10081465, in our opinion, the difference should be allocated to Consumption because inventory is 0,but it is very strange that the system remain not allocated amount.

entry.title: AI in E-Commerce: Transforming Customer Journeys and Optimizing Business Efficiency
entry.content:
AI greatly enhances e-commerce by tailoring customer experiences, automating content creation, and improving product visualization. It enables businesses to provide personalized product recommendations, create influencing marketing content, and offer virtual try-on experiences, as well as support customers online through virtual chatbots. AI enhances the online shopping experience for buyers while boosting productivity and generating innovative business insights. By leveraging AI, e-commerce platforms can better understand customer preferences, optimize operations, and drive higher sales, ultimately leading to a more customized and seamless shopping experience. Let's explore how eCommerce businesses use AI to enhance productivity and provide a best-in-class customer experience.

AI Implementation in E-commerce Customer Experience

AI implementation in E-commerce can be classified into two major business areas.

  • Customer experience - This covers the customer-facing elements of AI
  • Business operations - improve business operations in a significant way

Before delving into e-commerce AI use cases, let’s briefly examine the advancements, opportunities, and challenges in AI as a technology.

Today, every business is eager to explore implementing AI in their current and future roadmap to enhance the efficiency of their business operations and improve their customers' experience.

It covers small process automation, as well as advanced features such as agentic AI, or AI agents that act independently and autonomously. Through agentic AI, complex workflows can be automated, and efficiency and scale can be achieved without constant human supervision.

When a company considers its AI mission, it needs to look at the following critical aspects:

AI mission - Phase of discovery

There are a variety of industries and businesses, and their AI missions also vary. As a result, IT and business teams must do discovery to develop a strategy that will ensure long-term success. They should analyze AI business cases that are the right fit for the business. As soon as the team has a good understanding of the business cases, they can explore other aspects as well.

Business cases also can be derived based on go-to-market strategies like business-to-business, business-to-customer, direct-to-customer, etc.

Business cases can also be classified into two broad categories: optimizing business operations and providing the best-in-class customer experience.

Once the AI business cases are enlisted, the business team can prioritize and plan for the solution and look at the correct product/framework more suitable for the mission.

While selecting, the businesses should consider the following:

  • Supervised Business AI framework
  • List of out-of-the-box AI business cases
  • Flexibility to develop
  • Data collection boundaries and limitations
  • Scalable - extensible framework/Copilot that supports the development of business-specific AI features (custom extensions).
  • Training model - Configurable with the organization-selected LLM model
  • Privacy, security, and compliance strategy
  • AI Ethics checkpoints
  • Integration options with e-commerce systems
  • Supervision and evaluation techniques
  • KPIs to measure ROI

Selecting the product/framework

After the business case discovery, the team also need to consider a unique approach to selecting the correct product.

  • Machine learning / Deep learning techniques Support for analysis
  • options for configuration and change them
  • For Gen AI-based solutions, LLM model or the LLM model that the product uses.
  • How the Business AI model processes and secures the business data
  • Data privacy and security features (County )
  • AI ethics policy for the product
  • Flexibility to control and fine-tune the results
  • Transparency in the process
  • Skillset Required and training

AI business cases

Here are some of the most prevalent eCommerce business cases. Let's examine e-commerce cases based on business features, which will help plan how to prepare and proceed.

Shopping process - Search and Browse

Persona: B2C Customer / B2B Customer / Merchandising manager 

  • Improves customer experience 
  • Reduce the product discovery time

 Persona: Merchandising manager 

  • Improves the operation efficiency by automating the recommendations
  • Improves the average order value (AOV) and reduce the handling cost per order 

 

 

  • Trending Search - The trending search terms feature examines the search phrases entered by users and displays the most popular ones as a result.
  • Recommendations and Merchandising: Promote and advertise goods or services by means of Recommendations and merchandising carousels to provide the customer with the most relevant experience at that exact moment. These capabilities include:
  • Personalized Products: One-to-one behaviorally driven product recommendations based on each user's product view click path to show the most relevant products to the individual customer.
  • Related Products: Recommendations that predict the user’s next click and surface the corresponding products to the carousel.
  • Trending Products: Behaviorally driven product merchandising, using real-time shopping behavior to surface trending products. (Harmonized Recommendations and Merchandising: Combine and test recommendations with merchandising priorities.)
  • Recently Viewed Products: Recommendations that show recently viewed products list to the user, so they can quickly navigate back to the products they have been viewing.
  • Complementary Products: The Complementary Products feature displays products complementing the products the customer interacts with on the commerce storefront either by viewing them or adding them to the cart
  • Replenishment Products: The Replenishment Products feature displays recommendation of products that are replenished periodically

Intelligent Selling Services for SAP Commerce Cloud | SAP Help Portal

Gen AI Business cases.

SAP Commerce Cloud AI Business Cases

  • Generate Product Descriptions
  • Generate Product Attributes and Values
  • Generate a Blog Post
  • Create Social Media Post
  • Generate Product Banner Text
  • Visual Search + Image Generation and Background Editing
  • Ask Product
  • Shopping Assistant  
  • Image Generation and editing  

Search and Browse  

Visual Search or Visual Shopping

Persona: B2C Customer / B2B Customer

  • Improves customer engagement   
  • create intuitive shopping experiences
  • Improves product discovery

Persona: Merchandising manager 

  • boost conversion rates and customer satisfaction

With GEN AI-powered visual search, customers can upload images to find similar products in the catalog. Additionally, it detects objects in the image and allows the customer to select a product from the catalog.

Ask Product

Persona: B2C Customer / B2B Customer

  • Improves order conversion  
  • Reduce complexity in order process by getting answers / solution to their queries

Persona:  Sales Manager /Customer Service Representative 

  • Reduce the order placement complexity
  • Saving cost of the contact centre queries 
  • Sales rep can expedite the order process  

 Using uploaded product documents and product information, the generative AI will answer questions about the product. For example, if a customer wants to know about the warranty, the materials used, or how it is used, it will provide relevant information.

Shopping assistant -Conversational Agent

Persona: B2C Customer / B2B Customer

  • Improves order conversion 
  • Improve average order value 
  • Improve repeat purchases 
  • Reduce complexity in order process and helps to arrive the desired product

Persona:  Sales Manager /Customer Service Representative 

  • Reduce the order placement complexity and improve product discovery 
  • Saving cost of the contact centre queries 
  • Sales rep can expedite the order process  

A shopping assistant is an agent that helps customers discover and compare products through natural conversation. It functions as a plugin that can be integrated into any digital platform storefront.

It understands and processes complex customer queries through intuitive conversations and provides contextual answers, offering product suggestions based on the query. It may ask engaging questions to refine the recommendation

With its natural language capabilities and integration with the product catalog, it can have intuitive conversations with customers.

SAP supports these features with an add-on called CX AI Toolkit

Please refer here for more information SAP CX AI Toolkit | SAP Help Portal

Capabilities:

  • Integrates with SAP Commerce Catalogs
  • Natural Language, Intuitive Conversations
  • Product Recommendations Based on Query
  • Answer Product Questions
  • Answer Comparison Questions Across Products
  • Multilingual
  • JSON Responses for Easy Consumption (More features are getting released soon)

In future, It can also be enhanced with customer queries on the check-out process, order status and customer service-related queries. It may act as a one-stop assistant for the customer in the e-commerce channel

Generate Product Descriptions

 

Persona:  Product Content, Merchandising Manager / Marketing Manager

  • Reduce time spent on producing product content, Improve the operational efficiency to onboard products
  • Increase conversion rate and customer experience 

Appealing product descriptions can be generated using existing catalog data, including images, tags, and descriptions. It helps to generate unique and engaging product descriptions in multiple languages

The solution leverages existing catalog data to generate AI- enriched descriptions. It supports prompt-based special instructions for fine tuning the descriptions and enables bulk updates of SAP commerce Product records, ensuring efficient and scalable content management.

Generate Product Attributes - Product Tagging

Persona:  Product Content, Merchandising Manager / Marketing Manager

  • Reduce time spent on producing product content, Improve the operational efficiency by creating quality content for Site search and search engine optimization 
  • Increase conversion rate and customer experience 

Product Tagging utilizes image recognition and contextual analysis to automate the generation, of comprehensive product attribute sets. This feature enables the effortless maintenance of rich, consistent product data across all channels. These product attributes can be efficiently used in SEO and internal site search to improve the product discovery 

 Blog and Social Media posts / Product Banner texts

Persona:  Digital Sales Manager / Marketing Manager

  • Improves the productivity of the marketing team 
  • Increase Channel traffic and product awareness
  • Increase in conversion rate with effective marketing campaigns 

Streamline the creation of professional, personalized content for diverse business and marketing campaigns, ensuring rich and consistent messaging. Generate high-quality content by leveraging prompts and CX product data for targeted marketing objectives.

Generate a blog post- Use product detail from Commerce Cloud to write a blog post

Generate a social media post- Use product detail from Commerce Cloud to write a social media post

Generate product banner text- Use a selected product from Commerce Cloud, guided
by tone, length, and optional special instructions to generate product banner text

Image Generation and Background Editing

Persona:  Digital content Manager / Marketing Manager /Product manager 

  • Efficient production of images with minimal effort 
  • Optimize the best media content to give best customer experience 
  • Increase order conversion

The image generation tool enables the creation of engaging product visuals for our eCommerce site, online campaigns, ensuring brand consistency and driving higher online sales.

Product Image Designer integrates AI-driven image generation and image enhancement. It enables on-demand creation and editing of professional product visuals. This solution accelerates product launches, lowers photography costs, and ensures consistent visual quality. Th image designer can 

  • Create AI based new images
  • Clear /Change the backgrounds of the images to align with brand standards 
  • Improve the quality of the media content 

Generate AI images with product labels or logos overlaid on commerce product images - Easily add text and graphics to product images and banners

Future Roadmap of CX AI -Commerce 

Visual Information Extraction - Improved AI insights based on character recognition of images from commerce products in catalog

Commerce Product Review - Generate AI Summary of all your product reviews for a specific product through the Toolkit UI or API, highlight customer sentiment of reviews and highlight keywords

AI Product Translation - Product Description and Attribute generation in multiple languages , translate existing Commerce product descriptions and publish them in product catalog of SAP commerce cloud 

 Shopping Assistant -Improved version with additional features

Adopting a CX AI toolkit can significantly enhance customer interactions by improving product discovery and optimizing product data and content. The benefits of this toolkit include better search capabilities, enriched product information, and personalized content for social media. These features are helping to achieve enhanced customer experience, increased revenue, and a higher average order value (AOV).

The solution requires minimal setup, offers an affordable entry point with support program available to Customers. SAP is continuously working to give best customer experience, optimize business processes with advanced AI, which is driven by customer feedback and industry needs.

Thank you for taking the time to read this. We appreciate your support and wish you all the best!

Reach out to your SAP representative to explore these capabilities and discuss the next steps.

Enablement Resources:

  • Learning: Utilizing SAP CX AI Toolkit for SAP Commerce Cloud 
  • Doc 
    •  SAP CX AI Toolkit Features | SAP Help Portal 
    • User Guide | SAP Help Portal
  • Webcast: https://gateway.on24.com/wcc/eh/2983783/lp/4635850/master-your-product-catalog-with-business-ai-for-sap-commerce-cloud
  • YouTube: SAP CX AI Toolkit - YouTube 
  • blog: Integrating SAP CX AI Toolkit with SAP Commerce Cl... - SAP Community
  • Intelligent Selling Services for SAP Commerce Cloud | SAP Help Portal 
  • blog: Unlock the Power of AI with Intelligent Selling Se... - SAP Community
  • Learning: AI-Based Personalized Product Recommendation with Intelligent Selling Services for SAP Commerce Cloud

entry.title: Re: SAP ByDesign: Actual logistics area xxx and expected logistics area xxx do not match
entry.content: Does a label exist for this product already? I've seen this before when using standard web service ManageSiteLogisticsTaskIn for a product that has a label already created.

entry.title: Re: Prevent Trasnsfer from MSEG-SGTXT to Accounting Docum...
entry.content:
Hi @AB15212,

I recommend exploring the implementation of Substitution Rules. When an FI document is being created, check your conditions (e.g., material document from EWM) and develop your own logic to update the text in the FI document line item.

Here’s a useful link for further details. Create FI Substitutions using GGB1 (Substitution M... - SAP Community

Best Regards,

Rafael Tinoco

entry.title: User exit to check supplier PO invoice posting in hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a possibility to have a user exit to check supplier PO invoice during posting to check if should be parked or posted when the account assignment is project or others in hana public cloud. If not any other options. Tks.

entry.title: Re: Limited Catalog View
entry.content: hey, we have the same issue, somebody know the solution, really we are going to apreciated..

entry.title: SAC Story Drill-Through Not Working Across Different Models
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am experiencing an issue with drill-through functionality in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). When I use a hyperlink in an SAC story to drill through to another story with the same model, everything works as expected, and I am directed to the specific ID I selected.

However, when I try to drill through to a story that uses a different model (even though I copied the model and the data is identical), I am not taken to the specific ID. Instead, the entire story is displayed without filtering down to the ID.

I have verified that the data and setup are the same, but the only difference is the model. Does anyone have any suggestions or solutions for making the drill-through work when using different models?

Any help would be appreciated!

Thank you in advance.


Same Model:




Different Models:

entry.title: Re: Not allocated difference in CKMLCP
entry.content:
Hi @XuGuangY,

It looks like a not-allocated amount due to stock transfer. SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/1664283 explains the possible reasons for "Not allocated price differences for stock transfer postings plant to plant", i.e. the receiving plant is not included in the same actual costing run, or the receiver material has a price determination 2 (instead of 3), which makes it not subject to actual costing run.

If it doesn't solve the problem, a ticket might be needed to grant access to the system for in-depth analysis.

Thanks!

Grace

entry.title: Re: How to Display the Supplier's Additional Name in the...
entry.content:
Hello, 

When you add a value to the 'additional name' field on the supplier master, you can get the supplier name and the additional name on the purchase order by using the 'Formatted Name' binding. 

Purchase Order > SellerParty> FormattedName

Hope this helps!

entry.title: How to create a Routing Rule in SAP GRC for different approvers on Role Approval process (BRF+)
entry.content:
Hey guys I have the following scenario here in my SAP GRC:

Using the Role Approval process , I want the final approval to be made by Internal Controls when it is a Business role (based on Business Sub Process value) or IT personnel when it is a IT role. I was trying to use BRF to be able to do that but I have some doubts like:

Which Rule should I create? Routing Rule or a Initiator Rule?

I was able to create the Decision Table but how can I trigger this type of validation to be executed and redirects the approval?

I mean, I created the lines as IF SubProc = IT then RESULT = IT_APPROVAL_PATH but I do not know exactly how to call it to determinate the correct path/stage.

Imagine something like the SOD Violation detour.... it´s the same thing , whether the role is IT defined on the Sub Process it should detour to IT approval else it can go to Internal Controls....

Can anyone give some advice or a guide to achieve that?

entry.title: In Treasury I am getting error " Event Linkage Not Active"
entry.content:
Hi Experts

When I try to create a Financial Document with FTR_Create I get error " Event Linkage Not Active"

Please help me resolve the issue

entry.title: Re: Not allocated difference in CKMLCP
Re: Not allocated difference in CKMLCP
entry.content: May be it is relevant to the note 3398006 because of error message ML4HMASTER 118

entry.title: Disable "show value" at input fields of Fiori Apps
entry.content:
Hi Expert 

I would like to disable the "Show Value" function that occurs in fiori apps.
If there is a simple setting that allows me to disable it, please let me know how to do it.
(not a developer level setting, but a cnfiguration and parameter setting level setting method)

By "Show value" I am referring to the list of field values ​​that are automatically displayed when I enter one or more characters in a specific field. For example, if I enter "T" in the BP code field, a list of BPs starting with T will be displayed. Please see the screenshot.
I don't know what to call this function, so I've decided to call it show value for the time being.

BR
Takashi

entry.title: Re: How to create a Routing Rule in SAP GRC for different...
entry.content:
Hi @Fernando_Costa,

To achieve this, you need to configure a routing rule by following these steps:

1. Define Custom Agent Rules:

• Create two custom agent rules to identify Internal Control Owners and IT Personnel.

• Ensure you have the logic and agent type identified. If not, please share more details so I can guide you on the agent rule configuration.

2. Configure the Routing Rule:

• Set the input as the business process and the result as the Routing Path to determine Internal Control Owners and IT Personnel.

• Map these results to the “Rule Result Value” in Stage 2 of MSMP for the routing rule.

3. Define Paths in MSMP (Stage 5 - Maintain Paths):

• Create two separate paths: one for Internal Control Owners and another for IT Personnel.

• Assign the respective custom agents to each MSMP path stage. Since we are routing from the 2nd last stage, we have to keep this stage at each of the routed paths to be consistent with the requirement.

• In Stage 6 of MSMP (Maintain Route Mapping), link these stages to the Routing Rule and Routing Paths.

4. Enable Routing in the Approval Process:

• In the second-to-last stage of role approval (before the final approval path), enable Routing and provide the rule ID of the newly created routing rule.

• This configuration is done at Stage 5 of MSMP.

Let me know if you need further clarification.

Best regards,

Debashish Sarma

SAP Access Control for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Name of iOS app is not showing correctly on iOS and MacOS
entry.content:
the name of the app is different from the field of the name for the build. when I download on MacOS, in the application folder the app is shown as SAP Build apps.app instead of the usual name. Same problem on iOS for testflight version. the app number is 72300. This is a new problem appearing since Mar 2, 2025 it seems

dear Dan, could you please check @Dan_Wroblewski 

Thank you !

Chantal

entry.title: Subcon Po value not matching with good receipt
entry.content:
Dear team,

We have entered  Subcon entry in purchase group A18, After creation of subcon po and Good receipt , Stock showing correct in MB52 stock report but value not matching in good receipt .

Actual PO price was 2.75 Rs. per Kg but in good receipt price was completely different we have created po for 6line items for example ABCDEF @2.75 Rs per Kg but in good receipt MIGO price was 2.7453, 2.716, 2.72 Rs etc completely different from Po price .
Since stock already consumed and not able to reverse the Good receipt.

kindly advise to resolve the issue and do the needful

意大利的酒窝 Vini d'Italia.app 

then when download is about 60% completed, the name is suddenly changed to 

SAP Build Apps.app

Thank you for checking

Chantal

entry.title: Re: Stay Certified with SAP Learning
entry.content: Getting ERROR 404, same as @dr_marcus

entry.title: Re: SAC Story Drill-Through Not Working Across Different...
entry.content: The issue was resolved by linking a common dimension between both models in target model. Once I established the link, the drill-through functionality started working as expected, and it correctly filtered to the specific ID in the target story.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
#BDC #Insight App

Has SAP released the list of Insight Apps as part of SAP BDC ? Is there a link available.

entry.title: Re: Need help to optimize/compact code with abap 7.4 syntax
entry.content:
For better legibility, don't mix ASSIGNING and REFERENCE INTO if possible (it's possible here), keep names consistent ("item =" -> "doc_num =").

Also, it's best to give clues (e.g. did you try LOOP AT GROUP BY or GROUP BY in FOR iterations) than giving one solution to an exam without explanation, the OP won't have a good level if not doing efforts.

entry.title: Re: where customers can suggest enhancements or vote on enhancements suggested by others?
entry.content: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/

entry.title: Re: How to make Reportable Offer Approval fields non-edit able by Originator
entry.content:
I really wonder why SuccessFactors will have such design on the offer details field edit-ability control.

I have the same requirement as per your blog that I don't want any field in offer details editable due to business scenario the candidate application will have offer approval process but later on it will be forwarded to another JobReq for confirmed position. (kind of evergreen concept that offer approval will be performed under evergreen JobReq but then application will be forwarded to child JobReq when the confirmed position/JobReq is really created for subsequent offer letter and EC hiring processes)

I appreciate you have provided the solution just there is a limitation seems textarea field cannot be used to trigger onChange rule, as well as reset back to JobReq/JobApp source.

I am still thinking how to tackle my business scenario...

entry.title: Re: Multiple Calculations on the Calculated View Field in...
entry.content: Use the 'Split' function in the calculated field. character to split should be ','  and split item to return should be 2. This should give you back the required string here.

entry.title: Re: Internal error in LCL_ACTIVITY_COST_SETTLEMENT method...
entry.content:
Please check SAP Note 3416540

https://me.sap.com/notes/3416540/E

 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content: If both your accounts "DRV0055" and "DRV0020" are leaf member and not calculated account, I don't thinkt it's a problem of aggregation(of DA calculation).  Calculation is done on the lowest combinations of all other dimensions with both accounts. I would suggest you to add all your dimensions into the table grid to understand the calculate result.  I assume not all the bases of displayed(aggregated on non displayed dimensions) value accounts not having same combination.

entry.title: Re: Performance Boost and Caching Strategy for Faster Data Access using "cds-caching" in S
entry.content:
Great to see cds-caching in action! @NaveenChandar @maxi1555, you guys rock! 😀
A few comments (no criticism, just hints) on your examples:

@NaveenChandar: You already mentioned in your post, that cds-caching can take care creating keys, but you chose to do it manually. This is totally fine. But to add this information here: cds-caching let's you pass in a string, a CQN query or a full cds.Request and it will take care of creating an individual key. For requests the default key will also include user and tenant information. If you don't need this, then you can override this.

 

// Key will include hashed req.query/req.params, req.locale, req.tentant and req.user
cache.set(req, result, { ttl: 36000 })

// Key will include hashed query
cache.set(req.query, result, { ttl: 36000 })

// Key will include hash req.query/req.params and req.locale
cache.set(req, result, { ttl: 36000, key: { template: "{locale}_{hash}" } })

// If you want to create the key for later usage
const key = cache.createKey(req, { template: "{locale}_{hash}" } )

 

But again, if you want to manually create your key upfront, it's totally fine if you do it your way. 👍

@maxi1555, your comment is spot on. If you use annotations, then you don't need any JavaScript coding at all. If you apply the annotations, then the following code will be auto-generated in the background:

 

const cds = require("@sap/cds");

module.exports = async (srv) => {
  const cache = await cds.connect.to("caching");
  srv.prepend(() => {
    srv.on("READ", "Pincodes", async (request, next) => {
      return cache.run(request, next, { ttl: 36000 });
    })
  })
};

 

@NaveenChandar, this is also a streamlined way to implement your caching behavior and let cds-caching do the if-else checks via read-through caching.

In case you want to see what's going on internally, you can also enable debugging:

 

DEBUG=cds-caching cds watch

 

This will print out some logging information to the terminal and you can see if the cache is triggered.

Keep up the good work!

Kind Regards,

Mike

entry.title: Work Schedule rule and IT0007/IT0008
entry.content:
Hello there,

When we generate work schedule rule (rotating shifts), one week may have 5 working days, and another week may have 6 weeks - let's say, 8hrs/day. And, we may have holidays as well.

In the work schedule creation screen, we have daily, weekly, monthly hours, annual hours - which ultimately is also tagged to IT0007 and IT0008 (WorkHrs/period).

Again, month to month the working hours may vary. i.e. In March we have 31 days, and in Feb we have 28 days and so on. Let's say I maintain 176 hours under monthly working hours field in IT0007 - also reflected under IT0008. And I understand that this value (IT0008 (WorkHrs/period) - Technical Term: DIVGV) is being used in PCRs for calculation.

Then, can we consider that our results would be accurate? I could be missing something here. Can someone clarify this, please?

@sikindar_a  @vianshu

entry.title: MDK: OpenDocument crashed when opening a pdf for the first time
entry.content:
hello MDK experts,

i am facing an issue trying to use openDocument action with a pdf. 

Symptom : after a reset of my app, the very first occurrence of openDocument action crashes the app. reopening the app, the openDocument action is working fine. 

versions : Mobile Svcs 24.11.2 / iOS 18.3.1

app: built a simplified demo app to isolate this behavior: 

on the main page : one single button 

"OnPress": "/mdktest/Actions/openDummyPDF.action"

and the action is an OpenDocument pointing to a public url from w3.org. 

{
	"_Type": "Action.Type.OpenDocument",
	"ActionResult": {
		"_Name": "openDummyPDF"
	},
	"OnFailure": "/mdktest/Actions/FailurePdfload.action",
	"Path": "https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf",
	"MimeType": "application/pdf"
}

 

pattern of error : opening the app in mobile svcs for the first time > click on the button > crash
reopening the app, click on button > pdf is displayed fine. 
reset of the app > close mobile Svcs > onboarding of the app > click button > crash again.. etc . 

Has anyone already experienced similar issue with OpenDocument? 
Am I missing something here? any suggestion of workaround?

I am tempted to think this is an MDK bug with OpenDocument action. so I ll raise an incident to SAP support for this one. but in case someone faced the same problem, any thought is appreciated!

thanks

Damien

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content: In Data Action you could use AGGREGATE_DIMENSIONS, AGGREGATE_WRITETO functions. But in this case end calculation will be on WRITETO members

entry.title: [Case statement must have exactly one when clause] in Eclipse ADT
entry.content:
Hi All,

look at the following coding, it showed this error: [ Case statement must have exactly one when clause]

case when ConsolidationVersion = '10' then TranslatedAmt1
         when ConsolidationVersion = '20' then TranslatedAmt2
else 0
end as TranslatedAmt

and I want to know why it has such restriction and how to disable this restriction?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to enable SAP Audit Log Viewer service to collect all Audit logs from BTP Services - Part 1
entry.content: Would be better if you described how to actually get logs from both all subaccounts and the global account.

entry.title: Re: How to enable SAP Audit Log Viewer service to collect all Audit logs from BTP Services - Part 1
entry.content: @MatthiasL It will be described in coming next blogs.. This blog contains on enabling Audit logs viewe in Part 1

entry.title: Re: Disable "show value" at input fields of Fiori Apps
entry.content:
Hi Takashi,

this function is called "autocomplete" or "suggestion". Here's an example from the fiori guidelines page:
https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-web/input-field/#tabular-autocomplete

I suppose this is a standard fiori app, so I don't know of a simple settings to disable this function. Maybe you can have a look at the documentation on how to extend or modify this app:
https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F0703')/W12

entry.title: Re: In-House Repair in S/4HANA Service - Start with an Overview
entry.content:
Hi @sambtr,

That's right. You can only create one returns order, but you have the flexibility to include multiple repair items within a single returns order.
Regarding service orders and service quotations, these are not limited to just one; you can create multiple service orders and service quotations as needed.

Best Regards,
Udo

entry.title: Re: [Case statement must have exactly one when clause] in...
entry.content:
I find out that in query there should be just one when branch in case when statement,
CDS DDL - case_expr, Analytical Query | ABAP Keyword Documentation

 


but you can use multiple when branches in Cube. So the restriction is for query only

entry.title: Re: Can Crystal Server 2020 embed reports into body of em...
entry.content:
The other option is to create accounts on the CRS and give your Users Viewing rights.

The Viewer sends an EPF file type ( Picture of each Page ) to the user when viewing.

It does require you to purchase Licensing per user though. Contact Sales to discuss options and costs....

entry.title: Re: Security Vulnerability in SAP Crystal Reports for Ecl...
entry.content:
I pinged R&D to comment on this one.

Often though there are reported CVE's but CR doesn't use that part so it doesn't affect the use in CR Applications.

If you have concerns for your implementation in your app you will need to show R&D how your app is vulnerable in a test app they can look at.

They are in Shanghai so it may take a few days to get a response...

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP (Chennai, India)
entry.content: I'm interested.

entry.title: SAP SOM with SD Billing
entry.content:
Hi All 

My client would like to use SAP SOM for subscription orders and contracts, however they do NOT want to use Convergent Mediation, Convergent Charging and Convergent Invoicing. 

The vision they have is to use a SOM to establish the contract for usage items, have a BTP app to  collect all the usage data, and based on this carry out Billing in S/4 SD.

I have read the material and the architecture refers to all the other products.  Creating a subscription order and contract, there will NOT be a contract account as there will be no FI-CA.  

If I try and use an example, they want a contract for a service and the customer will pay the flat rate for 5 of these services a month.  The BTP app will check usage for the month.  If the usage is less than 5, they will be billed for the service as per normal.  If the customer uses 7 of these services in the next month, they are to be billed for the base 5 and the additional 2 at a agreed rate.  

The BTP app will get and provide the usage data, however, how can this be billed in SD ?

Any direction on this type of a solution would be greatly apprciated. 

In public clould there is subscription billing and to me that is a great fit to this solution.  However in private cloud, they can only consider BRIM, but they only want to use SOM and not the rest of it. 

 

Thanks

entry.title: The Future of SAP CAP: Will More Languages Be Supported?
entry.content: Does SAP have future plans to expand the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) to support other languages, such as C# or PHP, in addition to the current JavaScript and Java?

entry.title: Sap functional and excel edi mapping
entry.content: Hi everyone, functional SD/MM consultant here. I'm working for a integration project where we're integrating EDI messages. We prepared some excel mappings to send to PI consultant to make interfaces on PI side but he asked us to prepare an excel mapping with mapping rules that contain similar rules like the ones found in the screen. The problem is that we dont have PI structures of the EDI messages, do you know if i can get these somewhere or if i can get these from SAP ECC? Thanks

entry.title: Error Connecting ABAP Cloud to SAP Business Application Studio (BAS)
entry.content:
Error Connecting ABAP Cloud to SAP Business Application Studio (BAS)

Issue

When trying to connect ABAP Cloud to SAP Business Application Studio (BAS), the following error occurs:

"Could not get v2 and v4 services for ''."

This issue arises when attempting to use the Service Center in BAS to access the destination.

Destination Configuration

Below is the configured destination (sensitive details have been hidden):

#clientSecret=<< Existing password/certificate removed on export >>
#
#Sat Mar 08 12:16:11 UTC 2025
tokenServiceURLType=Dedicated
clientId=***************
Description=Destination generated by App Studio for Cloud Foundry Abap service instance: 'teste-ooo-pedrao', Do not remove.
tokenServiceURL=https://**************.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token
WebIDEEnabled=true
URL=https://**************.abap.us10.hana.ondemand.com/
Name=abap-cloud-teste-ooo-pedrao
WebIDEUsage=odata_abap,dev_abap,abap_cloud
Type=HTTP
HTML5.DynamicDestination=true
Authentication=OAuth2UserTokenExchange
HTML5.Timeout=60000
ProxyType=Internet

Steps Followed

The destination was created following the official SAP guide:
Creating Destination to ABAP System for SAP Business Application Studio.

However, when trying to use the Service Center in BAS, the error appears.

Possible Causes & Troubleshooting

What could be causing this issue? How can we ensure the destination is properly recognized by BAS and Service Center?

entry.title: Re: More than one validity area in import file
entry.content:
Hello

i do not have experience in OCC as such.. but check this "thinking"..

SAP defines the usage as "one rating with one or more validity areas".. 

In your file you used "PUBLIC" twice...

Normally you would not maintain in EHS "PUBLIC + US" + "PUBLIC + CA" but you try to find "bigger validity areas" which include both (my example is here not a good one) and/ or you maintain "Public + US + CA"

I am sorry. i believe i can not help here

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Product compliance events and integration
entry.content:
Dear all

we can assume that SAP will deliver on the long terms "APis" für "push" and "pull" of data. But SAP need time to do so. Please check the SAP roadmap of the product. Be aware of the fact that "such details as you are asking" might not be listed actively in the roadmap

The current available "APIs" are listed in the Online help this is the link to "on premise" version

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/1dddbd59984c4be0a835e4d998908762/6c5c6f7b27d2497b875249a1dd1438ad.html?locale=en-US

Hope this helps

C.B.

entry.title: 回复： 导入销售合同—2302云销售新功能前瞻
entry.content:
Hi,   @Feng_Chen ，

请教一下，导入销售凭证-销售订单，可以指定销售订单号吗？

我在配置中维护了手工录入销售订单号的编号范围，然后在EXCEL中销售订单（临时标识）维护了销售订单号。但是，系统最终还是按自动编码规则进行数字流水。

entry.title: 导入销售凭证-销售订单，可以指定销售订单编号吗
entry.content:
Hi,

在APP-导入销售凭证-销售订单，我导入销售订单。

我在IMG配置了销售订单类型的销售订单号手工编码规则。我在EXCEL的页签“订单数量”，字段“销售订单（临时标识）”中手工录入了销售订单编码，这个编码是符合手工编码规则的。 但是，导入后，系统还是对销售订单的编码按自动数字流水的编码规则。

有办法，让EXCEL导入的销售订单编号是按手工编码规则，从而保留手工指定的订单编号？

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Message Monitoring Logs Report
entry.content:
Hi veera

yes, we can.

entry.title: New era of data and analytics : SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC)
entry.content:
SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC), launched on February 13th, 2025, is a fully managed Software as a service (SaaS) solution designed to unify and govern all SAP data while seamlessly connecting with third-party data. BDC integrates SAP Datasphere, SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), and BW capabilities, with significant enhancements from Databricks.

Currently many organizations are facing poor data quality as data is stored on various system in structured / unstructured forms and maintaining all data is biggest challenge. The new BDC Platform will unify data from various sources, including SAP and non-SAP systems, to provide a complete view of enterprise data which can help organization to provide insights whenever needed. It will use AI and analytics to help businesses gain insights. The platform will include ready-made data products for different SAP applications.  It will integrate with Databricks for smooth data exchange and advanced data management. Additionally, it will offer a way for SAP Business Warehouse customers to modernize their data systems and move to the cloud.

 Benefits

  • Simplicity: Automates data integration using "Data Products".
  • Out-of-the-Box Insights: Provides pre-built "Insight Apps" for exploring and analysing data.
  • Openness: Can bring in data from both SAP and non-SAP sources.

Transition for Existing Customers

  • Existing Datasphere Customers: Can continue their services without interruption and have the option to transition to BDC over time.
  • BW Customers: SAP recommends evaluating BDC and Datasphere as next-generation alternatives for modern data management.

         SAP BW 7.5 Cloud, private edition, provides extended mainstream maintenance until 2030, surpassing the on-premises version which ends in 2027.

         SAP BW bridge will be supported until at least 2040.

         In future SAP will be providing migration paths for existing BW customers, allowing BW models and reports to be recreated in BDC with minimal disruption.

Future Trends

  • SaaS Dominance: A move towards fully managed services.
  • AI Integration: AI will be at the core of data analysis and automation.
  • Data Product Economy: Curated datasets will drive interoperability.

 

 How It Works

  1. Connect Data Sources: Such as SAP S/4HANA, SAP Datasphere, external databases, and APIs.
  2. Ingest and Process Data: Into a structured format.
  3. Apply Business Rules: Create semantic data models.
  4. Generate Predictive Insights: Using AI.
  5. Visualize and Analyse Data: SAP Analytics Cloud.

Insight Apps

  • Pre-built Applications: Deliver transformational insights for advanced analytics and planning.
  • Connect Insights and Business Decisions: Make faster, smarter decisions with prebuilt analytical apps.
  • Access Trusted Data Products: On a harmonized data model.
  • Growing Ecosystem: Build on SAP’s curated data products with your domain expertise.

AI-Powered Future

With the help of SAP Business Data Cloud, we can make data AI-ready. Joule AI Agents will enhance process automation and insights, it will be built on accurate, trusted data with business context. With full understanding of business and the most comprehensive data.

It does feel like we're stepping into a new era of data and analytics with the launch of SAP Business Data Cloud!

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Madrid 2025 - Mar 21, 2025
entry.content: Yes, we have sent confirmation emails already. There is a waitlist for this event as well. If you have RSVPed you should have received one or the other.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Madrid 2025 - Mar 21, 2025
entry.content: Looking forward to meeting you then.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Madrid 2025 - Mar 21, 2025
entry.content: We will also livestream the event 🤞.... you can check out the different times here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2zNL146thBrORy076Jg33K2fyfq25is3
